name: IRYOU NINJUTSU: HIKEN – KYOUI SAISEI (MEDICAL NINJUTSU: SECRETS – MIRACLE REBIRTH)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Medical)

Rank: 14 (Spell Level 7)

Chakra Cost: 200

Learn DC: 31 | Successes: 6

Perform: 19 | Perform DC: 39

Components: C, H, M, XP

This technique is nearly impossible to perform alone: You may have up to four characters of level 10 or higher with at least 1 level of Medical Specialist aid you, each granting you a +2 bonus to the Perform check. The aides do not need to know the technique and must concentrate on the technique just as you do. The Cost is shared equally between you and all assistants. If anyone is unable to pay that Cost, the technique fails.

This technique can be used on a living creature, or a creature that has died no more than 1 round ago (or has been preserved in stasis since then). While the technique is being performed, the target is held in stasis, causing it to be unaffected by the passage of time (and thus, negating periodic effects such as poison, fast healing or having to make saves while dying). When completed, the target is healed of all negative levels, poisons, diseases, ability damage, ability drain, paralysis, nausea, insanity effects, blindness, deafness, fatigue, exhaustion, tenketsu damage and Chakra coils damage. If the target was dying, it immediately stabilized. If it was dead, it is restored to -9 HP and becomes stable. Any limb that was severed from the target less than 5 days ago can be physically reattached without penalty, though this does not affect a severed head, and the limb is unusable for a week as the nerves reconnect. The target's natural HP recovery rate during bed rest is doubled for the next 1d4 days.
